overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing an assassin character navigating through 18th century Paris. The character exits a palace interior into a sunlit plaza with revolutionary barricades, then enters the crowded slum district of Cœur Des Miracles with dense NPC crowds, and finally enters a dark wooden building.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace interior hallway with red carpets and fallen bodies

events.description: character approaches and exits through large palace doors into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the palace interior past fallen bodies toward the exit doors

entered.detail: long red carpet runner with gold trim lining the main hallway
black and white checkerboard marble tile pattern
tall classical archway with ornate moldings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand palace interior with marble checkerboard floors and red carpets. Fallen bodies lie along the walls as the character approaches large double doors at the end of the hallway, transitioning to bright exterior light.

scene_state.functional_zone: barricaded plaza with revolutionary fortifications and debris

events.description: exits palace into sunlit plaza with wooden barricades and sandbag fortifications
character navigates around debris piles and wooden barricades while crossing the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the barricaded plaza, navigating around wooden fortifications and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: soldier in blue uniform with tricorn hat standing guard near barricades
civilians gathered near the wooden fortifications

entered.detail: wooden plank barricades with sandbags typical of 18th century revolutionary fortifications
large stone tiles covering the open plaza area
ornate black iron street lamps with multiple lanterns
scattered wooden planks and rubble from destroyed barricades

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright sunlit plaza filled with revolutionary barricades and debris. Soldiers in period uniforms stand guard near wooden fortifications as the character navigates through the open space toward a narrow alley entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded slum district with timber-framed buildings and narrow streets

events.description: enters narrow alley leading into the Cœur Des Miracles district with dense crowds
text 'Cœur Des Miracles' appears on screen identifying the slum district
character pushes through dense crowd and turns corner near stone archway

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowded narrow streets, weaving between groups of citizens in 18th century period clothing

notable_agents.action: citizen in grey coat and tricorn hat walking directly toward the camera
group of women in long dresses and bonnets conversing near a wall

entered.detail: tall narrow buildings with exposed wooden beams and plaster facades
uneven cobblestone pavement typical of historic Parisian streets
low stone walls lining the street sides
large stone archway entrance with carved details

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Cœur Des Miracles slum district through a narrow alley, emerging into crowded streets with timber-framed buildings. Dense crowds of citizens in period clothing fill the cobblestone streets as the character weaves through them, passing under a large stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden barn or warehouse interior with support beams

events.description: enters dark wooden building from the bright street, significant lighting change
interior becomes progressively darker as character moves deeper inside the structure

agents.ego_description: entering a dark wooden barn-like structure and walking through the dim interior

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden bench inside the building

entered.detail: thick wooden support beams and rafters of the barn structure
weathered wooden plank flooring with gaps showing ground below
hanging canvas tarpaulin covering an opening
stacked wooden crates and storage boxes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark wooden barn or warehouse from the crowded street, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim interior lighting. Inside, wooden support beams and rafters frame the space as the character walks past scattered NPCs and wooden crates toward the back exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sterile opulence of a palace interior into the chaotic streets of a revolutionary city before ending in a dim warehouse. It begins by following the character across marble checkerboard floors and red carpets past fallen bodies, moving toward large double doors that open into blinding exterior light. As the character emerges, the scene expands into a bright sunlit plaza cluttered with revolutionary barricades and guarded by soldiers, before the camera narrows its focus to follow the character into a tight alleyway. The environment then shifts into the dense Cœur Des Miracles slum district, weaving through thick crowds of citizens on cobblestone streets and passing under a large stone archway. Finally, the bright daylight vanishes as the character steps inside a dark wooden barn, moving past support beams and crates toward a rear exit.
